name: 78oz Recycled Glass Pitcher Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Upgrade your drinkware collection with this Recycled Glass Pitcher from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of 100% recycled glass, this pitcher is designed in a brown hue that makes your drinks look appealing and stylish. This glass pitcher features a spout and a handle for easy pouring, and has a capacity of 78 fluid ounces for serving various cold beverages.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
